title: Northeast Region of the National Association of Disability Examiners — Constitution and By-Laws
description: Governing constitution and by-laws of the Northeast Region of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — the regional (multi-state) governing tier above the individual NE state chapters. Includes a preamble (revised 6/11/99, Columbia, Maryland) and covers the region's name, geographic boundaries (Connecticut, Maine, Massachusetts, New Hampshire, New Jersey, New York, Rhode Island, Vermont, Puerto Rico, the Virgin Islands, and Canada), purpose, membership, the Delegate Assembly and its powers/proxy rules, the Board of Directors, officers (President, Vice-President, Secretary-Treasurer), the Northeast Regional Director to the NADE National Board, standing committees, amendments, and rules of order.
geographic_coverage: NADE Northeast Region (CT, ME, MA, NH, NJ, NY, RI, VT, Puerto Rico, U.S. Virgin Islands, and Canada)

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Northeast Region
source.title: Constitution and By-Laws of the Northeast Region of the National Association of Disability Examiners

notes: Authoritative NADE governing document. NOTE: this is a REGIONAL constitution and by-laws (the Northeast Region tier), not an individual state chapter — it sits above the NE state chapters (e.g. Maine, New Hampshire, New Jersey) cataloged in this directory. This is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source file 'Northeast-Region-Const-Bylaws.doc' (in the same directory); markdown formatting was machine-derived and the source contains OCR-style artifacts (e.g. 'beet possible service', 'ad5udication', 'NADS member') preserved as-converted. The preamble is marked 'Revised 6/11/99, Columbia, Maryland', captured as temporal_coverage. NADE url is the organization site, not a deep link to this document.
